summary: Maeda has explicitly flipped bullish in his most recent video, declaring that the market bottom is in and anticipating higher prices for Bitcoin.
narrative: After spending late 2025 profitably shorting Ethereum, his latest analysis marks a clear trend reversal where he identifies a market bottom and suggests new catalysts like STRC will drive Bitcoin up. He challenges the typical four-year cycle theory, arguing that the current price action signals the start of a new upward move rather than continued downside.

tweets.text: 🎬 Closed my ETH Short. What’s Next for Crypto?
🎬 Why I’m Short $1.5M of ETH (It’s So Over)
